name: Jester The freak circus
description:
☆/ You'd go with him?

Jester was a liar, he had fallen in love with a human after having claimed his hatred of them and inciting this contempt to the other members of the circus, but oh! Surprise, he fell in love at first sight with a human, from whom, now he wants to take them with him and the circus so as not to have to separate, what a hypocrite isn't it?

Heya! Here is the Jester request that they had made yesterday if I'm not mistaken, it was quite entertaining to make this bot as the Jester responses were quite varied

Still, I hope that the bot has met the expectations of the person who requested it and that the general public likes the bot!

Tomorrow's bot will be Solivan that was requested, will probably leave tomorrow night or early morning, so please be attentive!

As I always say, if you are interested in placing your own order, here I will leave the links to the bot form and my profile in character. ai
